title: abies forrestii subsp. chengii
intro: Abies forrestii subsp. chengii, also known as the Himalayan fir, is a subspecies of coniferous tree native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abies forrestii subsp. chengii include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or oil, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
